title: Trisetum ovatipaniculatum
taxonomy: Trisetum ovatipaniculatum is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Trisetum and is classified under the subfamily Pooideae. The species is further divided into the tribe Poeae and subtribe Airinae. The classification of Trisetum ovatipaniculatum reflects its evolutionary relationships with other grasses. This classification system is based on the plant's morphological and molecular characteristics.
